_comment: Per-service config. THE single file to update when AI services change. Re-verify quarterly. Char limits are approximate — phrase guidance qualitatively in copy.json.

chatgpt.name: ChatGPT
chatgpt.where_to_paste_human: Open ChatGPT, click your profile (top right) → Settings → Personalization → Custom instructions. There are two boxes; we'll show you which goes where.
chatgpt.notes: Custom instructions apply to all chats.

claude.name: Claude
claude.where_to_paste_human: Open Claude, click "Projects" in the left sidebar, then "Create project." Paste this whole thing into the project description.
claude.notes: Projects keep your instructions separate from your normal chats. Requires Claude Pro for full features.

gemini.name: Gemini
gemini.where_to_paste_human: Open Gemini, click "Gems" in the sidebar → "New Gem." Paste this into the instructions box.
gemini.notes: Gemini has a stricter length limit than the others — we automatically trim optional sections to fit.
